'''Pirt Neer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] studying at the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Pirt Neer was inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and received her [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Neer remained at the Temple and participated in the [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]]. Administrated by Master [[Ilena Xan]], Neer faced off against fellow Initiate [[Enver Hoxha]] and defeated him during the Round of Eight. Despite her apparent victory, Neer was forced to yield when [[Lena Missa]] placed her in an arm bar.<ref name="YDR" />
